title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 402.148 - Governing boards and directors, law not to amend duties and liabilities of
text:
402.148.  Governing boards and directors, law not to amend duties and liabilities of. — Nothing in sections 402.130 to 402.148 shall act to amend the status of governing boards or the duties and liabilities of directors under other applicable law.
(L. 2009 H.B. 239)
